name: manage-external-memory
description: Create and safely manage a tool-neutral local external-memory workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Create and safely manage shared local AI memory.
interface.longDescription: Create, inspect, validate, and safely maintain a Markdown external-memory workspace shared across AI tools, with a beginner tutorial and approval-gated updates.
defaultPrompt: Open the beginner tutorial without changing files.
Create a new external-memory workspace after a dry run.
Validate an existing external-memory workspace without fixing it.
